exhibits.name: State Regulations and Requirements Addendum
exhibits.notes: Multistate addendum with material overrides for 13 states. Includes IL fee deferral requirement imposed by IL AG. VA adds development-stage company risk factor.

exhibits.name: List of State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: 14 states listed with administrator addresses and agents for service.

exhibits.name: AumBio Franchise Agreement

sub_documents.name: Schedule A - Initial Franchise Fee, Territory, Ownership
Schedule E - Agreement Not to Compete and Confidentiality
Schedule F - Confidentiality and Non-Solicitation for Employees
Schedule H - Form of Release, Covenant Not to Sue, Indemnification

exhibits.notes: Complete franchise agreement with all 8 schedules and Illinois rider. FA has 30 articles covering grant, term, location, fees, development, operations, confidential manual, marks, advertising, modifications, accounting, insurance, debts, assignment, default/termination, post-termination, covenants, dispute resolution, ownership, taxes, indemnification, approvals/amendments, notices, governing law, severability, entire agreement, force majeure, acknowledgements, submission.

exhibits.name: Multi-Unit Development Agreement

sub_documents.name: Schedule A - Development Area and Development Fee

exhibits.notes: Multi-unit development agreement for up to 3 units. Includes exclusive development area, development schedule, and Illinois rider with fee deferral requirement.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements

sub_documents.name: Statements of Operations and Members' Equity (Deficit)

exhibits.notes: Audited by Muhammad Zubairy, CPA PC (Westbury, NY). Unqualified opinion. Two years ended Dec 31, 2024 and 2023. IMAGE-ONLY pages — no text layer; rendered via pdftoppm. Entity has zero revenue, zero assets, bank overdraft of $9, and is in members' equity deficit.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: NONE. No current franchisees as of December 31, 2024. No franchisees left the system in the 12 months prior to December 31, 2024.

exhibits.name: Operations Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Operations Manual has 121 pages across 9 sections: Preface/Introduction/Getting Started (35), Staffing/Training (15), Safety (5), Operations (26), Customer Service (2), Marketing (19), Financial Management (10), Technology (7), Conclusion (2).

exhibits.name: Receipt
exhibits.notes: Two receipt pages (franchisor copy and franchisee copy). Lists all exhibits. Issuance date March 19, 2025. Franchise seller: Kamil Czubacki.
